sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: He fed them with the finest wheat and satisfied them with honey from the rock.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: You are a priest forever, In the line of Melchizedek

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: I am the living bread that came down from heaven, says the Lord; whoever eats this bread will live forever.

sections.title: Exposition/O Saving Victim
sections.author: Curtis Stephan/Steve Angrisano
sections.snippet: O King Exalted, savior of nations, we lift our eyes to heaven’s throne. Hear us, Redeemer, show us your mercy; we place our trust in you alone.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Whoever eats my flesh and drinks my blood remains in me and I in him, says the Lord.

sections.title: The Body of Christ
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: This is the Body of Christ, beautiful, broken and blessed; miracle of the greatest of loves, presence of God in our midst. This is the Cup that he shares, endlessly emptied and poured; sacrifice made so that we might be saved now and forevermore.

sections.title: Bread of Angels
sections.author: Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Bread of angels, we receive you; with us now abide. Precious Jesus, manna of ages, with us now reside. Panis angélicus fit panis hóminum, Dat panis cáelicus figúris términum.

sections.title: All That We Have Seen
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: All that we have seen, we will not hide away. We will hold it up as the light of day, a lamp of mercy meant to guide and lead carried to the least. We will show the world all that we have seen.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
